Fast Start Hat Template

Date: 

PERSON’S NAME:

NAME OF POSITION: Project Manager/Quality Control

PURPOSE (The reason why the position exists): To ensure that all production is managed with timeline management, productions management and to ensure that top premium quality is being met on all production and results driven from company services delivered to clients. 

VIEWPOINT (The viewpoint and attitude that an employee should have, to be successful at the job): Motivated, driven, educated and growth oriented in the willingness to grow with the company and seeing that the growth comes from a well maintained team getting high quality work done for all clients in short time frames without falling victim to stress. 

EFFICIENCY: Daily communications to all team members to ensure that the production is being managed and projects are being completed in timelines originally set and discussed with clients. Managing and communicating internally and externally with team members and clients. 

PROFESSIONALISM: Courteous, brave, intelligent, efficient in each position being managed, and self sufficient to deliver high quality communications every communication.

TRAINING: Megalodon Executive training (20 books), digital marketing training, social media training, marketing automation training and management/leadership training. 

COMPUTER SKILLS REQUIRED: efficient on social media, efficient on all Microsoft programs, knows adobe photoshop and final cut pro

RESPONSIBILITIES OF THE POSITION:

(If it is an executive position the responsibility is always getting others to get the work done)

Manage projects and project timelines 

Measure, track and enter all company stats

Report all stats to COO and CEO

Daily communications with all team members to ensure production is held to high standard and producing premium work 

Quality control check all work before being given or published for clients

Openly communicate all processes or systems that could be implemented and then help implement those systems when created. 

WEEKLY ACTIONS:

Daily communications with team members

Timeline management reporting

Efficiency reporting

Stat reporting

Executive meetings for high production levels to be obtained

DAILY ACTIONS AND QUANTITIES:

Internal communications Quantity – 30 per day

External communications Quantity – 5 per day

STATISTICS:

Main Statistic:

Sub Stats:



EXPECTED FINAL PRODUCT: To produce a well managed, high efficiency, high production production unit that delivers premium, high quality work.
